anchor: The Sephora homepage or makeup category page is displayed with various product categories visible, and the agent needs to navigate to foundation products.
question: What is the next meaningful action the agent will likely take in the interface?
reference_answer: Click on the Foundation category or navigate to the Foundation section to browse foundation products
accepted_answers: Click on Foundation category
Navigate to Foundation section
Select Foundation from the makeup menu
Browse to the Foundation product page

anchor: The foundation product listing page is displayed with multiple foundation options visible, and filter options are available on the side.
question: What is the next meaningful action the agent will likely take in the interface?
reference_answer: Apply a filter for hypoallergenic, fragrance-free, or sensitive skin formulas to narrow down foundation options
accepted_answers: Filter by sensitive skin or hypoallergenic
Apply fragrance-free filter
Select skin concern or ingredient preference filters
Click on a filter option for gentle/sensitive formulas

anchor: A specific foundation product page is displayed showing product details, ingredients, and an Add to Cart button.
question: What is the next meaningful action the agent will likely take in the interface?
reference_answer: Click the Add to Cart button to add the selected foundation to the shopping cart
accepted_answers: Click Add to Cart for the foundation
Add the foundation to cart
Select Add to Basket/Cart button
Add this foundation product to the shopping bag
partial_answers: Click a button on the product page

anchor: The foundation has been added to cart and a confirmation or cart panel is visible; the agent needs to continue to find mascara.
